title: Rebuilt
description: A complete overhaul of Minecraft from the ground up, featuring new combat, biomes, enemies, dimensions, and more!
body:
![The logo of the modpack - the word "Rebuilt" on top of a coarse dirt block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/499c0a0f6f501a9c5fb76c18696d3cfc3812ef5c.png)

Welcome to Rebuilt! Rebuilt a complete overhaul of Minecraft from the ground up, featuring new combat, biomes, enemies, dimensions, and more.

Rebuilt features a multitude of high-quality mods such as the Aether, Quark, and Create, all linked together via KubeJS to make one singular cohesive experience. Rebuilt isn't just a random jumble of mods tossed together into a folder - everything has been painstakingly configured and tweaked so that every added mod seamlessly integrates with both vanilla content and all other mods present.

### Installation

To install Rebuilt, it is recommended to use [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/). Simply add a new instance, click on the "Modrinth" tab to the left-hand side of the screen, search for Rebuilt, and install it. 

<details><summary>Credits</summary>
  
- Create-style tooltips script by PINPAL
- Aether Flow datapack by baguchi

</details>
